name: Ferroamp Elektronik AB (publ)
summary: Ferroamp Elektronik AB (publ) provides energy and power optimization solutions for homes, real estate, and industries in Sweden. The company offers EnergyHub, a hub that communicates with components, gathers relevant information, and optimizes the energy flow between solar panels, energy storage, electricity grid, and consumers; solar string optimizers; energy storage solutions; and Fireman Switch, a fire fighter breaker systems. It also provides technologies and systems, including adaptive current equalization (ACE) technology; Powershare; and Energy Cloud, a software portal for effect optimization with property surveillance, analytics tools, and management systems. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Sp√É¬•nga, Sweden.
